rx-hero.headline: Treat & Help Prevent Migraine With One Medicine
rx-hero.subheadline: For acute treatment, many patients experienced pain relief within 2 hours — in some patients lasting up to 48 hours.
rx-hero.disclaimer: †Based on prescription data as brand in class (oral CGRP receptor antagonists). Current as of 2025.

indication.text: INDICATION: Calvexa® (selvegepant) is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine attacks with or without aura, and for the preventive treatment of episodic migraine, in adults.

two-ways.title: Calvexa® helps treat migraine in 2 ways

way-acute.title: Acute Treatment
way-acute.subtitle: Treat attacks when they happen
way-acute.stat1Desc: Pain relief at 2 hours vs 43.3% with placebo
way-acute.stat2Desc: Pain freedom at 2 hours vs 10.9% with placebo
way-acute.stat3Desc: Freedom from most bothersome symptom at 2 hours vs 26.8% with placebo
way-acute.safetyNote: Do not take more than 1 tablet in 24 hours.

way-prevent.title: Prevention
way-prevent.subtitle: Reduce migraine days every month
way-prevent.stat1Desc: Fewer monthly migraine days during weeks 9–12 vs 3.5 fewer with placebo
way-prevent.stat2Desc: Of patients achieved ≥50% reduction in monthly migraine days vs 26% with placebo
way-prevent.stat3Desc: Day dosing — one tablet every other day for prevention
way-prevent.safetyNote: Safety of more than 18 doses in a 30-day period has not been established.

savings-card.amountLabel: per prescription fill for eligible patients

savings-copy.headline: Get Calvexa® for as little as $0*
savings-copy.body: We believe cost should never be a barrier to migraine relief. Eligible commercially insured patients can access Calvexa® with significant savings through our patient support program.
savings-copy.disclaimer: *Eligible commercially insured patients may pay as little as $0 per prescription. Insurance coverage must be approved. Not valid for patients enrolled in Medicare, Medicaid, or other federal/state programs. Maximum annual benefit applies. Terms and conditions apply.

stories.name: Maria, 38
stories.quote: I used to cancel plans all the time. Since starting Calvexa®, I've been able to show up for my family again.

stories.name: James, 45
stories.quote: The dissolving tablet is so convenient. I always have it with me and it starts working fast.

stories.name: Priya, 31
stories.quote: My migraines were affecting my work. The prevention aspect of Calvexa® has changed everything for me.

signup-copy.headline: Sign up for helpful tips & updates
signup-copy.point1: How Calvexa® works and how it can help
signup-copy.point2: Methods of managing your migraine attacks
signup-copy.point3: Tips for talking to your healthcare provider

signup-form.legalText: By signing up, you agree to receive communications from NovaPharm. You can unsubscribe at any time. See our Privacy Policy.

isi-sticky.text: IMPORTANT SAFETY INFORMATION: Calvexa® (selvegepant) is contraindicated in patients with known hypersensitivity to selvegepant or any excipients. The most common adverse reactions (≥2%) were nausea, indigestion, and abdominal pain. Do not use in patients with severe hepatic impairment. Please see full Prescribing Information and Patient Information.

isi-full.heading: Important Safety Information
isi-full.contraText: Calvexa® (selvegepant) is contraindicated in patients with known hypersensitivity to selvegepant or to any of the excipients of Calvexa®. Hypersensitivity reactions, including facial swelling and urticaria, have been reported.
isi-full.warningsText: Hypersensitivity Reactions: Hypersensitivity reactions have been reported. If a serious or severe hypersensitivity reaction occurs, discontinue Calvexa® and initiate appropriate therapy. Hepatic Impairment: Avoid use in patients with severe hepatic impairment. Breastfeeding: There are no data on the presence of selvegepant in human milk.
isi-full.adverseText: The most common adverse reactions (≥2% and greater than placebo) in acute treatment clinical trials were: nausea (2.7%), indigestion (2.4%), and abdominal pain (1.5%). The most common adverse reactions in the prevention clinical trial were: urinary tract infection, nausea, and upper respiratory tract infection.
isi-full.useText: Pregnancy: Based on available data, there are no identified risks of major birth defects, miscarriage, or adverse maternal or fetal outcomes associated with selvegepant. Paediatrics: Safety and effectiveness in paediatric patients have not been established.
